title: Charges laid over discharge of firearm in Kwanokuthula
description: PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - Charges relating to...
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"Breaking News\n Video","html":"Breaking News\n Video"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - Charges relating to the discharging of a firearm and pointing of a firearm allegedly involving Bitou's deputy mayor Nokuzola  Kolwapi have been laid at Kwanokuthula police station.","html":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - Charges relating to the discharging of a firearm and pointing of a firearm allegedly involving Bitou's deputy mayor Nokuzola Kolwapi have been laid at Kwanokuthula police station."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"In a video that went viral after Kolwapi is shown allegedly discharging a handgun in 10 Sajini Street in Kwanokuthula."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The incident allegedly occurred during Mgidi celebrations her son Tsepiso Martin (18), who matriculated this year.","html":"The incident allegedly occurred during Mgidi celebrations her son Tsepiso Martin (18), who matriculated this year."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"According to community members Bitou's mayor Jessica Kamkam and Speaker Mavis Busakwe attended the celebrations.","html":"According to community members Bitou's mayor Jessica Kamkam and Speaker Mavis Busakwe attended the celebrations."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Two cases of discharging a firearm in public and pointing of firearm, as well as reckless endangerment charges are expected to be added to the complaint.","html":"Two cases of discharging a firearm in public and pointing of firearm, as well as reckless endangerment charges are expected to be added to the complaint."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Video circulated"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Southern Cape SAPS media spokesperson Warrant Office Christopher Spies confirmed Kwanokuthula detectives were investigating a case of pointing of a firearm following an alleged incident at Sajini Street, Kwanokuthula, on Sunday, 21 December at about 10:30.","html":"Southern Cape SAPS media spokesperson Warrant Office Christopher Spies confirmed Kwanokuthula detectives were investigating a case of pointing of a firearm following an alleged incident at Sajini Street, Kwanokuthula, on Sunday, 21 December at about 10:30."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He said according to reports available Kwanokuthula police members visited a premises after a video of the incident was circulated on social media.","html":"He said according to reports available Kwanokuthula police members visited a premises after a video of the incident was circulated on social media."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\" Investigation into this incident is at an early stage and no arrests has been made yet.","html":"\" Investigation into this incident is at an early stage and no arrests has been made yet."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"SAPS is not in a position to divulge particulars of individuals involved at this stage,”said W/O Spies.Requests for comment have been sent to Kolwapi, Kamkam and Busakwe, and as soon as they are received they will be added to the report.","html":"\"SAPS is not in a position to divulge particulars of individuals involved at this stage,”said W/O Spies.
Requests for comment have been sent to Kolwapi, Kamkam and Busakwe, and as soon as they are received they will be added to the report."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Facebook video:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Your browser does not support HTML5 video.","html":""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Charges laid over discharge of firearm in Kwanokuthula
